# Best AI Audio Tools for Musicians in 2026

Musicians are using AI to produce better music, master their tracks, and unleash their creativity. Let's explore the best tools!

Explore our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/200|Suno]]: Create Full Songs with AI

[[link:/tools/200|Suno]] is revolutionizing music creation by letting anyone generate complete songs with vocals, instruments, and production.

### Suno for Musicians
- **Full song generation**: From lyrics to finished music
- **Multiple styles**: Pop, rock, jazz, classical, and more
- **Vocal quality**: Realistic singing voices

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]: AI Voice & Sound Design

[[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] isn't just for voiceovers — musicians can use it for vocal processing, sound design, and creating unique audio textures.

### ElevenLabs for Musicians
- **Vocal effects**: Create unique vocal sounds
- **Sound design**: Generate custom audio textures
- **Voice cloning**: Create AI versions of voices

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---
